<!-- Code generated by gen-dns-providers; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Configuration for the [all-inkl](https://all-inkl.com) DNS provider.

See the [lego documentation](https://go-acme.github.io/lego/dns/allinkl/) for full details.

```yaml
letsEncrypt:
  dnsProvider: "allinkl"
  dnsCredentials:
    # ALL_INKL_LOGIN: KAS login
    inklLogin: ""
    # ALL_INKL_PASSWORD: KAS password
    inklPassword: ""
    # ALL_INKL_HTTP_TIMEOUT: API request timeout in seconds (Default: 30)
    inklHTTPTimeout: ""
    # ALL_INKL_POLLING_INTERVAL: Time between DNS propagation check in seconds (Default: 2)
    inklPollingInterval: ""
    # ALL_INKL_PROPAGATION_TIMEOUT: Maximum waiting time for DNS propagation in seconds (Default: 60)
    inklPropagationTimeout: ""
```

You may also use the raw lego environment-variable names as keys instead of the normalized names.
Credentials may also be supplied directly as system environment variables, in which case `dnsCredentials` can be omitted.
